name: Kristian Uremovic
title: Cybersecurity Researcher & Student
education: Purdue University — B.S. Cybersecurity, Finance Minor (Expected 2027)
bio: Cybersecurity researcher at Purdue CERIAS studying compiler-level binary hardening for ARM embedded systems. Concurrent research in LLM mechanistic interpretability and ML anomaly detection through the Purdue Data Mine. Pursuing a B.S. in Cybersecurity with a Finance minor.
aboutLong: Cybersecurity researcher at Purdue CERIAS studying compiler-level binary hardening for ARM embedded systems. Concurrent research in LLM mechanistic interpretability and ML anomaly detection through the Purdue Data Mine. Pursuing a B.S. in Cybersecurity with a Finance minor.
